text.title: Debt Scoring Rubric Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from "we have a backlog of debt items" to "ranked register published".

step.name: collect
step.input: grooming session, debt backlog, AI-suggested candidates.
step.action: List candidate items: title, category, code/design pointer. Dedupe by location + symptom.
step.decision-gate: If <5 items → STOP, scoring overhead not justified.

step.name: anchor
step.action: Walk anchors per factor: "User-Impact 5 in this product means …". Get sign-off (email + date).
step.decision-gate: If stakeholder refuses anchor commitment → STOP, verdict block-missing-anchors.

step.name: score
step.action: For each item: pull change-frequency from git, fragility from tracker, blast-radius from service map. Score 1-5 per factor with evidence row. Compute score per formula. Assign confidence (high if all evidence is mechanical; medium if mixed; low if guessed).
step.decision-gate: If evidence row missing for any factor on any item → STOP, verdict block-no-evidence.

step.name: cross-check
step.action: Sort by score. Cross-review top-10 + bottom-10 for anchor drift. Adjust if a top item feels intuitively wrong AND audit the anchor.
step.decision-gate: If recomputing the formula yields a different score than the recorded one → STOP, verdict block-formula-mismatch.

step.name: publish
step.action: Validate against schema. Commit `debt-register-<YYYY-Q>.json` to repo. Flag items above threshold for next sprint. Schedule re-score in 90 days.
